我不善言词，也只能用这寥寥百字来表达我对作者大大文章的喜爱，但我的喜爱定是不只这百余字。所以我想请作者大大加油！
然后，祝作者大大、祝大家新年快乐！☃"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1673789320,"group_id":"7118788133453302796","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyNKEFv/6x9vMX5Pcv+kRZI=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7c1c439017c443bcb7405cb9e542616f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704664&x-signature=w2k34D7pHGP2XLJTOzfcnbVtipc%3D","user_id":"98318093536","user_name":"低于:D"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"98318093536","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7118788133453302796","book_info":{"abstract":"【漫同_合集_原创男主_短篇_OOC狂魔_二次元_轻松无脑_魔改】
啊哈！这个世界就是一个巨大的旋转着的齿轮！
把二次元的世界全都揉成了一团！
乱七八糟的世界？不不不，管你看不看得懂，看！就完了！
世界次元名录预收（顺序不做参考）：《黑子的篮球》《我是大哥大》《凹凸世界》《樱兰高校男公关部》《东京复仇者》《叶罗丽精灵梦》《网球王子》《文豪野犬》《吸血鬼骑士》《鬼灭之刃》……
Ps：本书由多个独立的短篇同人文组成，涵盖范围广，多以原创男主视角为主，主角名字各不相同，作者努力的融入原作世界，给大家不一样的体验。请多支持～","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/fe36bd5bba06480c42fe58d1e2081980~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"乐乐猹","author_id":"","book_id":"7118788133453302796","book_name":"【综漫】次元旋转","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181810","creation_status":"4","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7118980589293994508","read_count":"125","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"113747"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.4","serial_count":"53","tags":"动漫衍生,二次元,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/fe36bd5bba06480c42fe58d1e2081980~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779363209&x-signature=GDPSAwW981g8v%2FqmMBWB38dsu0k%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3787167640063691","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5.777061e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032219332901061C5A0F32D651E850"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":17,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":756,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":6533,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2382},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user
